zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Hotham於1319年出生在英國越可爾福利斯頓時，她的父親Sir John de Hotham II57歲，母親Agnes Daniel41歲。她於1349年與Sir Thomas Sutton在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1394年3月18日在她的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Hotham于1319年出生在英国越可爾福利斯頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Hotham II57岁，母亲Agnes Daniel41岁。她于1349年与Sir Thomas Sutton在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾德內斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1394年3月18日在她的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hotham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name usually from Hotham (East Yorkshire), but occasionally perhaps also from Holtham in Legsby (Lincolnshire). The East Yorkshire placename may derive from Old English hōdum, dative plural form of hōd ‘shelter’, while the origin of the Lincolnshire placename is uncertain. Compare Holtham .

variants.name: Holtham
meanings: habitational name from a place so named or a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) enclosure in the wood’, from Middle English holt ‘wood, grove’ + ham ‘enclosure’ (Old English holt + hamm). Compare Haltom and Holtom .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Hotham was born in 1319, in Flixton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John de Hotham II, was 57 and her mother, Agnes Daniel, was 41. She married Sir Thomas Sutton in 1349, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 18 March 1394, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Hotham est née en 1319, à Flixton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Hotham II, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Agnes Daniel, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Sutton en 1349, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1394, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Hotham 1319 in Flixton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Hotham II 57 und ihre Mutter Agnes Daniel 41. Sie hat 1349 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Sutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. März 1394 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Hotham è nata il nel 1319 nel Flixton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Hotham II, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Agnes Daniel, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Sutton nel 1349, nel Holderness, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1394, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Hothamが1319年にイギリスヨークシュアイアフリクストンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Hotham IIは57歳，母Agnes Danielは41歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスでSir Thomas Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1394年3月18日に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Hotham(이)가 1319년 영국 요르크실르 플릭스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Hotham II(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Daniel(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 Sir Thomas Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 3월 18일 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Hotham nasceu em 1319, em Flixton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Hotham II, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Daniel, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Sutton em 1349, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Hotham родилась в 1319 г. в местности фликстон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Hotham II было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Daniel, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Sutton в 1349 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 18 марта 1394 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Hotham nació en 1319, en Flixton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Hotham II, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Agnes Daniel, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Sutton en 1349, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1394, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
